summary: Email Content Improvements - All 15 tests passed. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. The send_acceptance_confirmation_email method now correctly handles all 4 cases: (1) Video+Guarantee, (2) Video+NoGuarantee, (3) Physical+Guarantee, (4) Physical+NoGuarantee. Email subject uses new format 'Confirmation d'acces — {title}'. Video emails contain proof link with 'Confirmer ma presence et rejoindre' button, provider labels (Zoom/Microsoft Teams/Google Meet), ICS button, timezone note. Physical emails contain GPS/QR check-in section, location, ICS button, NO proof link. All emails contain 'confirmation d'acces definitive' note.

backend: Video+Guarantee: proof link, Zoom label, ICS, timezone, penalty reminder, 'confirmation d'acces definitive'
Video+NoGuarantee: proof link, Microsoft Teams label, ICS, NO penalty reminder
Physical+Guarantee: GPS/QR section, location, ICS, penalty reminder, NO proof link
Physical+NoGuarantee: GPS/QR section, location, ICS, NO penalty reminder
Subject format: 'Confirmation d'acces — {title}' (no emoji, no hyphen)
webhooks.py passes appointment_type and meeting_provider to email method
invitations.py passes appointment_type and meeting_provider to email method
POST /api/invitations/{token}/respond endpoint exists (returns 404 for invalid token)

seed_data_creation: None - tests use mocked email sending to capture HTML content
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email content improvements verified. The send_acceptance_confirmation_email method in email_service.py now accepts appointment_type and meeting_provider params. Both webhooks.py (Stripe webhook) and invitations.py (direct accept) correctly pass these params. All 4 email cases (video/physical x with/without guarantee) produce correct content. Test file test_email_content_improvements.py created for regression testing.
